sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n42369" key="e)rhmoba/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐρημο-βάτης</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n42369.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">traveller in deserts,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).151</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
